observations.archetype_gloss: Embodiment of decay and internal collapse
observations.summary: Aviel is depicted as a figure undergoing systemic decay, representing the Shadow archetype through his physical and psychological deterioration, symbolizing the internal rot and collapse of the self.

evidence.quote: Aviel reached into his belt and pulled out three heavy shekels. He held them out to Dan, his hand shaking slightly.
